title: Health Risk Prediction System
text: An end-to-end machine learning application built to estimate and predict diabetes risks based on key clinical health metrics. The predictive model utilizes a random forest classifier architecture rather than standard linear baselines to capture complex non-linear feature interactions.

title: Predicting Crop Insurance Claim Risk
text: This predictive modeling framework was engineered to identify and classify insurance claim risks for smallholder farmers. By utilizing comprehensive exploratory data analysis (EDA) and advanced classification techniques, the engine isolates high-risk profiles to improve underwriting accuracy and premium pricing.

title: Strata Insurtech Platform
text:
A high-performance, decoupled microservices architecture designed to transition traditional insurance pricing into real-time, risk-optimized premium generation.
```text strata-insurtech-platform/ │ ├── prod_freq_xgb.json # Serialized Poisson Frequency Engine ├── prod_sev_lgb.txt # Serialized Gamma Severity Engine ├── prod_survival_cox.pkl # Serialized Cox Hazard Proportional Model ├── engine.py # Core mathematical & actuarial matrix processing ├── main.py # High-performance FastAPI REST API endpoints ├── app.py # Multi-page interactive Streamlit dashboard ├── requirements.txt # Production-locked application dependencies ├── test_pipeline.py # Automated unit test and validation suite └── Dockerfile # Environment blueprint for containerized deployment
